http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/share/b/pub/licq.help Mar 6, 2006 CONTENTS: Unix ICQ Clients For More Information Unix ICQ Clients ---------------- MICQ, a text-based ICQ client for Unix, is installed for Solaris x86 only. This version

, is installed for Solaris x86 only. This version seems to work, but it's pretty bare-bones. To run it, type: % /usr/sww/pkg/micq-0.4.3/bin/micq LICQ, a GUI client for ICQ, has also been compiled for Solaris x86, but it is not being supporte

led for Solaris x86, but it is not being supported by Instruction because it's currently too buggy to compile a recent version. You're welcome to try to use this, but it might not work, and we probably won't be able to fix it if it breaks. To ru

bably won't be able to fix it if it breaks. To run it, type: % /usr/sww/pkg/licq-0.61/bin/licq For More Information -------------------- Official ICQ web site: http://www.mirabilis.com http://www.icq.co
m http://www.icq.com LICQ web site: http://www.licq.org EECS Instructional Support 378 & 386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
